audit_items.proof_trace: The bid() function executes sequentially: auctionCallback is called at L449 (inside a conditional block for data.length != 0), and safeTransferFrom is unconditionally placed at L453, after the callback block exits. Solidity's sequential execution guarantees this ordering on all paths. The reentrancy guard (s_entered, L415-418) prevents reentrant bid() calls during the callback, and _whenNoLiveAuctions() (L668-671) prevents setAssetOut from changing the payment token while any auction is live, making it impossible to bypass or reorder the payment pull.
